title: Three Dead Barriers as EML-2 Depth Failures

analysis.object: T909: Three Dead Barriers as EML-2 Depth Failures depth analysis

relativization_bgs.description: Baker-Gill-Solovay: oracle proofs relativize. Relative proofs are EML-2 (polynomial oracle queries).

natural_proofs_rr.description: Razborov-Rudich: natural proof must be LARGE (EML-2: polynomial density) and CONSTRUCTIVE (EML-2: polynomial time).

algebrization_aw.description: Aaronson-Wigderson: algebraic extensions of relativization. Algebraization is Δd=0 (same depth as relativization).

delta_d_zero.description: All three barriers are Δd=0 operations: they cannot CROSS from EML-2 to EML-inf. They stay inside EML-2.

meta_theorem_pattern.description: Each barrier is a meta-theorem: proofs using X cannot separate P from NP. X is EML-2 bounded. Separation requires Δd=+∞.

barrier_as_depth_proof.description: The barriers PROVE that EML-2 methods cannot prove P≠NP. They implicitly confirm: P≠NP needs a method that crosses EML-2 -> EML-inf.

t909_theorem.description: T909: All three barriers (relativization, natural proofs, algebrization) are EML-2 bounded (Δd=0). No EML-2 method can cross to EML-inf. The barriers are NOT obstacles to proof -- they are CONFIRMATIONS that the proof must use EML-3 or cross-type methods. T909.

analysis.theorem: T909: Three Dead Barriers as EML-2 Depth Failures (S1189).

key_theorem: T909: Three Dead Barriers as EML-2 Depth Failures (S1189).
